moatbomb:blockdesc-moatbomb-t1: A tier-1 'Moat-bomb', Auto-floods almost any block space within the (5 blocks) blast radius below sea-level.
moatbomb:blockdesc-moatbomb-t2: A tier-2 'Moat-bomb', Auto-floods almost any block space within the (7 blocks) blast radius below sea-level.
moatbomb:blockdesc-moatbomb-t3: A tier-3 'Moat-bomb', Auto-floods almost any block space within the (8 blocks) blast radius below sea-level. Contains a springwound detonator so it doesn't need a firesource. Perfect for underwater use.
